# Pull Request

## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Content addition or expansion
- [ ] Clarity / readability improvement
- [ ] Exercise update
- [ ] Tool reference update
- [ ] New template or resource
- [ ] Facilitator guide update
- [ ] Documentation / README

## Modules / Files Affected

List the files changed:

## Testing

How did you verify this change is correct?

- [ ] Personally tested the exercise or prompt described
- [ ] Verified tool behavior as described
- [ ] Reviewed by another facilitator or subject matter expert
- [ ] Reviewed with a participant cohort

## Notes for Reviewer

Anything the reviewer should specifically check or be aware of?
